texto: Often we can't find the power of life even when we're born with it
autor: like a horseman can't find his horse when he is riding on it.
explicacao: Citação de like a horseman can't find his horse when he is riding on it. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Often we can't find the power of life even when we're born with it” articula reflexao, debasish-mridha, often em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
